completed_since_last_snapshot: P5 SLICES S5.1-S5.4 IMPLEMENTED AND COMPLETED this session (built + tested; not yet VERIFIED — that awaits the S5.9 phase report). Suite grew 241 -> 290, all green. The GDOS Scoring Engine now judges a level end-to-end via judgeLevel(evidence, profile) -> GdosReport. Content generation STAYS hard-gated (M2 needs P5 fully verified + P6).

S5.1 GDOS kernel + design space: src/eval/gdos/{Report,Profile,Evidence,Score,DesignSpace,Economy}.ts + the top-level src/eval/Evaluate.ts seam. EvidenceBundle assembled ONCE (dm-0031); ScoringProfile holds ALL calibration (strict-parsed like the level schema, DEFAULT_PROFILE carries REQ-055/056 numbers as data); DesignSpace axes DERIVED from registries (dm-0034); Economy = depth/mechanic-count (REQ-042).

S5.2 Emotional gate (src/eval/gdos/Emotional.ts, REQ-055/015): Confidence/Curiosity/Surprise/Mastery as honest DELIVERED proxies over the bundle, coefficients from the profile; authored emotional-budget curve is the intent cross-check. S5.3 Streamability gate (Streamability.ts, REQ-056): ReactionDensity/ClipPotential/ReplayValue/Shareability; Surprise reused from the emotional gate (no divergence). S5.4 InfoDensity regulator + REQ-016 fairness (InfoDensity.ts): profile viewport slid over geometry (overwhelm/boring), and the same window is the fairness primitive (an off-screen killer = unfair). All estimator sources ledgered dm-0036.

Harness extended: src/eval/AgentHarness.ts gained replayObserved() -> TickObservation[] (per-tick runState + player + lethal positions) feeding Evaluate.ts's death extraction (killer attribution + lookback snapshot for fairness). Evaluate.ts is the ONLY module that both runs the P4 audits and touches gdos — kept OUT of gdos/ so gdos stays audit-import-free (dm-0031).

Tests: test/helpers/GdosFixtures.ts (hand-built bundles + verdict/profile builders); test/unit/Gdos{Profile,DesignSpace,Emotional,Streamability,InfoDensity}.test.ts; test/integration/GdosEvaluate.test.ts (real assembler + determinism). EvalIsolation.test.ts extended: recursive math-whitelist over src/eval/gdos/ + a 'no re-auditing' scan (gdos imports the local audit pass only as `import type`, never the macro pass). Two-profile tests in every gate prove calibration is external (dm-0031).

PKG: +11 nodes (eval/gdos/{report,profile,evidence,score,design_space,economy,emotional,streamability,infodensity,judge}; eval/evaluate), agent_harness node updated, all dependents both directions + edges added, pkg_hash s4-g7d8e9 -> s5-h1e2d3. Ledger dm-0036 recorded. Docs: task_slices S5.1-S5.4 COMPLETED; execution_plan C5.1-C5.4 checked; backlog REQ-040/041/042/055/056/061/015/016 -> IN_PROGRESS. SDLC gate: 0 blocking.

CONTENT GENERATION STAYS HARD-GATED until M2 (P4+P5+P6) is fully VERIFIED. P5 slices S5.1-S5.4 are COMPLETED but NOT VERIFIED (that is S5.9); S5.5-S5.8 remain; then P6. Do NOT author level/chapter content. Fixtures remain unit scaffolding only.

THE GDOS ARCHITECTURE IS SET (dm-0031-0036): every score is a proxy over the ONE EvidenceBundle; ALL calibration lives in ScoringProfile (zero calibration literals in gate logic — the two-profile tests enforce this); gates emit DesignDecision records. Keep it.

NO RE-AUDITING + PURITY (dm-0031/dm-0037, two scans in EvalIsolation.test.ts): src/eval/gdos/ imports the local audit pass ONLY as `import type`, AND imports NONE of AgentHarness/Evaluate/local/Search/core/Engine — it runs no sim and no search, scoring purely from the pre-assembled EvidenceBundle. src/eval/Evaluate.ts is the one place that runs audits + assembles evidence, which is why it (and, next, EmergentFun) lives at top-level eval/, not gdos/. There is NO exception to weaken — reading the ARCHETYPES registry as data (DesignSpace, dm-0034) is allowed because it executes nothing.

ONE-WAY DEPENDENCY (dm-0022) still holds: nothing under src/{core,systems,components,entities,schema} imports from src/eval/. Math whitelist now scan-covers src/eval/gdos/ too (dm-0017). No Math.random, no Date.now (all gdos code is pure; profile parse takes no clock).
P4 verdicts are the P5 inputs, consumed only inside the EvidenceBundle: SolvabilityVerdict, SoftlockVerdict, ExploitVerdict, OptimizationVerdict. Never re-run them in a gate.
GdosMetadata semantics belong to P5 (dm-0012); the emotional-budget curve is the delivered-vs-intended cross-check. Any schema extension bumps the version explicitly (P5 plan open questions 2/3).
meta/design_memory_ledger.json is the executable Design Memory's backing store (S5.6 will make it executable) — keep it strictly valid JSON with all five Intent Repository fields per entry.

Do NOT change FIXED_STEP_SECONDS (dm-0003); never mutate GameState in place (dm-0004). CANONICAL_PIPELINE from src/eval/AgentHarness.ts is the only sanctioned engine assembly order (replayObserved uses it).
The private npm mirror npm.shootsta.com is broken; .npmrc pins registry.npmjs.org — don't remove it.
Working tree carries UNCOMMITTED changes (dm-0030 refinement from session 4 + all of this session's P5 S5.1-S5.4 code, tests, PKG, ledger, docs). Commit only when the user asks.
